name: Log4Shell Hash in Flows
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to Log4Shell Exploit (CVE-2021-44228) is observed.

Note: Log4Shell MD5, Log4Shell SHA1, Log4Shell SHA256 have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when the flow matches File Hash is not N/A

when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "File Hash") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Log4Shell Hash in Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches File Hash is not N/A

AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell MD5', "File Hash")  OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA256', "File Hash")  OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Log4Shell SHA1', "File Hash") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: An IOC (File Hash) related to Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
